system.description: You grow an additional arm or leg. Roll 1d6: 1-2: you gain another leg increasing your movement rate by 5m/action but suffer a -1 modifier on all DEX throws; 3-6, you gain another arm useful for manipulation or combat. You do not gain extra attacks per round with an extra arm, but you could carry a two handed-weapon and a shield. You cannot wear regular armor due to your unusual shape and must have armor custom-made for you at quadruple price.
